content_gaps: The SERPs are dominated by marketplaces (Etsy, Amazon) and listicles of generic, often mass-produced items (wind chimes, picture frames, blankets). There is a significant gap for a dedicated page focusing on a single, high-quality, handcrafted piece of jewelry as a memorial gift.
Most results focus on gifts *for a granddaughter*. There is very little content targeting a grandson, son, or other male family members who are grieving.

The concept of symbolism is shallow. Pages mention angel wings or hearts, but don't explore deeper, more unique symbolic connections that handcrafted jewelry can offer (e.g., animal symbolism, specific natural elements, etc.).
There is no content that speaks to the artisan nature of the gift. The emotional value of a handcrafted, artist-made piece is a completely missed angle.
